description: Build 91 can only claim a build-90 StoreKit purchase after the user upgrades and uploads signed proof. It cannot protect an immutable build-90 client that was charged but never upgrades. Releasing therefore requires ONE external fact this repo cannot itself prove: (a) provider/TestFlight evidence that build 90 can no longer initiate checkout, or (b) an owner-approved, explicitly bounded charged-before-upgrade recovery policy. This artifact is evaluated by apps/ios/Scripts/build90_recovery_gate.py, which is wired into verify_build91_entitlement_contract.py and FAILS CLOSED until one evidence form is supplied and complete. Do not fabricate evidence.
notes: Operators may supply real evidence out-of-band via the TONO_BUILD90_RECOVERY_EVIDENCE env var (path to a JSON file with the same 'evidence' object) instead of committing it here.
The two evidence forms are mutually sufficient: exactly one complete form flips the gate to READY.
